calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Determine Party Prevailing On Contract And To Fix Amount Of Attorneys Fees Awardable As Item Of Costs
Off Calendar Mar-04-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT MARK ISHIKAWA'S Motion To Determine Party Prevailing On Contract And To Fix Amount Of Attorneys Fees Awardable As Item Of Costs is granted. No opposition filed. Prevailing party shall prepare and submit a proposed order to the Court for signature. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)

REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
Off Calendar Jan-20-2016 Text Ruling

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons, Vacate Default Judgment And Dismiss Action
Off Calendar Jan-14-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT MARK ISHIKAWA'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons, Vacate Default Judgment And Dismiss Action is granted. No opposition filed. The prevailing party is to provide a form of order.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/EG)
